special_mechanics.name: Tornado Spin
special_mechanics.description: Taz can spin into a tornado to defeat most enemies, gain extra jump distance, knock away items, and get past certain obstacles unharmed

special_mechanics.name: Fire Breath
special_mechanics.description: After eating chilli peppers, Taz can breathe fire to defeat stronger enemies

special_mechanics.name: Eating/Consumption
special_mechanics.description: Taz can eat various objects including health items, extra lives, continues, and consumable power-ups; bombs and weed killer can be thrown but damage Taz if eaten

special_mechanics.name: Temporary Invincibility
special_mechanics.description: Collecting a star grants Taz temporary invincibility

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source contains gameplay description but no precise physics parameters (velocities, accelerations, gravity values, or sub-pixel data). Movement mechanics documented descriptively rather than numerically. Game known for excellent animation but specific kinematic values not available in public documentation.
